zh.title: 藏传佛教末法预言 - 时轮金刚、伏藏与诸仁波切的14条预言与验证 | Tibetan Buddhist Prophecy
zh.description: 藏传佛教末法时代预言完整收录，来源包括《时轮金刚密续》、莲花生大士伏藏、敦珠仁波切等藏传大师的预言。涵盖正法衰退、香巴拉勇士、末法战争等主题。
zh.keywords: 藏传佛教预言,末法时代,时轮金刚,香巴拉,伏藏,莲花生大士,敦珠仁波切,末法预言,藏密预言,Kalachakra
zh.ogTitle: 藏传佛教末法预言 | Tibetan Buddhist Prophecy
zh.ogDescription: 藏传佛教末法时代预言完整收录，来源包括时轮金刚密续、伏藏文献与藏传大师预言。
zh.twitterDescription: 14条藏传佛教末法时代预言，含时轮金刚、莲花生伏藏、敦珠仁波切等大师预言与验证。

en.title: Tibetan Buddhist Prophecy - 14 Predictions from Kalachakra, Terma & Rinpoches | Full Archive
en.description: Complete collection of Tibetan Buddhist end-of-Dharma prophecies from the Kalachakra Tantra, Padmasambhava's terma texts, Dudjom Rinpoche, and other Tibetan masters. Themes include decline of Dharma, Shambhala warriors, and the final battle.
en.keywords: Tibetan Buddhist prophecy,Kalachakra,Shambhala,terma,Padmasambhava,Dudjom Rinpoche,end of Dharma,Buddhist prophecy,Tibetan predictions
en.ogTitle: Tibetan Buddhist Prophecy - Kalachakra, Terma & Rinpoche Predictions
en.ogDescription: Complete collection of Tibetan Buddhist end-of-Dharma prophecies from the Kalachakra Tantra, terma texts, and various Tibetan masters.
en.twitterDescription: 14 Tibetan Buddhist prophecies from Kalachakra Tantra, Padmasambhava terma, Dudjom Rinpoche. Archive with verification.
